summary: Backend API testing completed for iteration 2 - All 12 test scenarios passed (100% success rate). Tested all 7 user credentials, push token endpoint, procedure creation with push notifications, Phase 2 submission, approval flow, and nurse 403 restriction.
critical_code_review_comments: Push notification helper (send_expo_push_notifications) implemented correctly with proper async/await and error handling
Push token endpoint correctly stores token in user document
All 7 user credentials work as expected with correct roles
seed_data_creation: Test created TEST_ prefixed procedures for push notification and nurse approval tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 iteration 2 tests passing. Key findings: 1) All 7 user credentials work correctly with proper roles, 2) Push token endpoint registers tokens successfully, 3) Procedure creation triggers push notifications without crashing (async to Expo API), 4) Phase 2 submission and approval workflows work correctly, 5) Nurse correctly gets 403 when trying to approve procedures.

test_results_summary.test_09_create_procedure_triggers_push_n: PASSED - Procedure creation returns 200 even with push notifications
test_results_summary.test_12_nurse_cannot_approve: PASSED - Nurse gets 403 when trying to approve
